summary: Frontend-only testing of /privacy-policy page with Precision Craft design system. All features verified across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. Legal document page renders correctly with 2-column layout, all 11 sections, sticky sidebar, and proper SEO.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PrivacyPolicyPage fully tested with Precision Craft design system. All requirements verified: Hero (solid navy #0D1B2A background - NO image, 3px orange #FF5722 bottom border, breadcrumb Home→Privacy Policy, H1 'Privacy Policy', subtitle 'FixitBay LLC Appliance Repair & Maintenance', meta row with Effective date Dec 24 2025 and Last updated Dec 24 2025), 2-column layout (72% content 792px + 28% sidebar 308px), Intro paragraph with border-bottom separator, All 11 sections with numbered badges (01-11): 1-Information We Collect (3 sub-sections A/B/C with bullet lists), 2-How We Use It, 3-How We Share It (callout box 'We do not sell...' with checkmark and orange left border), 4-Data Retention, 5-Data Security, 6-Cookies & Analytics, 7-Communications/SMS (STOP badge with orange background rgba(255,87,34,0.1)), 8-California Rights, 9-Children's Privacy, 10-Policy Changes, 11-Contact Us (dark navy card #0D1B2A with phone/email/area/website links), Sidebar Widget 1: TOC with 11 numbered anchor links that scroll to sections (verified working), Sidebar Widget 2: Key Highlights (4 checkmark items), Sidebar Widget 3: Contact (phone + email buttons), Sidebar sticky at top:80px, Footer (logo, phone (760) 543-5733, © 2026 FixitBay LLC), NO floating 'BOOK REPAIR' button (float-btn count = 0), NO mobile sticky bar (mobile-call/book/text = 0), Phone links href=tel:7605435733 (3 total), Email links href=mailto:info@fixitbay.net (2 total), Mobile responsive single column layout (359px), Data-testid attributes: privacy-hero, privacy-title, privacy-content, contact-card, sidebar, sidebar-phone, privacy-footer, SEO: BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema with 2 items (Home, Privacy Policy), meta title 'Privacy Policy | FixitBay LLC Appliance Repair & Maintenance', meta description, canonical https://fixitbay.net/privacy-policy.

desktop_1920x1080: Hero: solid navy #0D1B2A background (NO image), 3px solid #FF5722 orange bottom border
Breadcrumb: Home → Privacy Policy with orange arrow separator
Meta row: 'Effective date: December 24, 2025' + 'Last updated: December 24, 2025'
Section 01 - Information We Collect: 3 sub-sections (A. Information You Provide, B. Information Collected Automatically, C. Information from Third Parties) with bullet lists
Section 02 - How We Use Your Information
Section 03 - How We Share Your Information: Callout box 'We do not sell your personal information' with checkmark and orange left border
Section 07 - Communications, Calls, and Text Messages (SMS): STOP badge with orange background rgba(255,87,34,0.1)
Section 11 - Contact Us: Dark navy card #0D1B2A with phone/email/area/website
Sidebar Widget 1: TOC 'Contents' header with 11 numbered anchor links
Sidebar Widget 2: Key Highlights with 4 checkmark items
Sidebar Widget 3: Contact with phone (760) 543-5733 + email info@fixitbay.net buttons
TOC anchor links functional (scroll to sections verified)
mobile_390x844: H1 'Privacy Policy' responsive (24px via CSS media query)
Global Navbar bottom bar (Book/Call) present - this is from Navbar, NOT page-specific mobile sticky bar
seo_verified: Title: Privacy Policy | FixitBay LLC Appliance Repair & Maintenance
Meta description: Privacy Policy for FixitBay LLC Appliance Repair & Maintenance – learn how we collect, use, and protect your information...
